description_long: This is a modern, multi-story urban house with a flat roof and a clean, boxy architectural design. The front facade features a large garage door, a main entryway, and several windows, with a driveway and sidewalk leading up to the entrance. The upper floors include open terraces, a rooftop garden, and a glass-enclosed balcony, providing outdoor living spaces. The house is primarily constructed from concrete and glass, with some wooden decking visible on the terraces. The rear and side views show minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy, while the front is more open and inviting. Adjacent to the house are small outbuildings and landscaping elements, suggesting a well-planned urban lot.
description: A modern, multi-story urban house with a flat roof, large windows, garage, and rooftop terraces, featuring concrete, glass, and wood elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entry, large windows, driveway, and rooftop terraces with visible outdoor spaces.
description_view_1: Side view with a mostly solid wall, minimal windows, and a glimpse of the rooftop terrace and glass balcony.
description_view_2: Rear view with limited window openings, rooftop garden, and adjacent outbuildings and landscaping elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wall, rooftop terrace, and the arrangement of outbuildings and driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass balcony
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a large door, adjacent garage, and a paved driveway; minimal decorative elements, emphasizing clean lines.
